SURFACE TEXTURE PER ASME B46.1. HEAD TO SHANK FILLET, THREAD FLANKS, THREAD ROOT, SHANK ("D" DIAMETER) AND BEARING SURFACE OF HEAD, 32 MICROINCHES RA. OTHER SURFACES, 125 MICROINCHES RA.

125 KSI MIN SHEAR, NICKEL ALLOY 718 FLUSH TENSION HEAD, SPLINE-LOK   SOCKET RECESS, R PIN, EDDIE-BOLT   2, 100 R

SCALE 4 : 1

## TABLE I - DIMENSIONS &amp; MECHANICAL PROPERTIES (CONTINUED)

| FIRST DASH NO.   | NOM   | SPLINE-LOK®   | SPLINE-LOK®   | SPLINE-LOK®   | Z MAX 3   | DOUBLE SHEAR STRENGTH LBF MIN   | TENSILE STRENGTH LBF MIN   |
|------------------|-------|---------------|---------------|---------------|-----------|---------------------------------|----------------------------|
| FIRST DASH NO.   | NOM   | ( Y)          | T DEPTH MIN   | J DEPTH MAX   | Z MAX 3   | DOUBLE SHEAR STRENGTH LBF MIN   | TENSILE STRENGTH LBF MIN   |
| 5                | 5/32  | .100          | .060          | .140          | .010      | 5,280                           | 2,940                      |
| 6                | 3/16  | .120          | .065          | .140          | .015      | 7,060                           | 4,350                      |
| 8                | 1/4   | .160          | .080          | .160          | .015      | 12,260                          | 7,750                      |
| 10               | 5/16  | .189          | .105          | .210          | .015      | 19,160                          | 12,300                     |
| 12               | 3/8   | .242          | .100          | .205          | .015      | 27,600                          | 19,100                     |

PROCUREMENT SPECIFICATION:                       EBS2202.

MATERIAL:                                                            NICKEL ALLOY 718 PER AMS5662.

HEAT TREAT:                                                         125,000 PSI SHEAR MINIMUM.

FINISH &amp; LUBE:                                                      JC  =    ALUMINUM PIGMENTED COATING PER PS103 ON HEAD AND SHANK ONLY.

CETYL ALCOHOL LUBE PER AS87132.  17

- VC =    IVD ALUMINUM COATING PER MIL-DTL-83448, TYPE II, CLASS 3 ON HEAD AND SHANK ONLY, AND CETYL LUBE PER AS87132 17

NC =    NO FINISH &amp; CETYL ALCOHOL LUBE PER AS87132.

- NF  =    DRY FILM LUBE PER AS5272, TYPE I (HEAD &amp; SHANK ONLY, OVERSPRAY PERMITTED)  &amp; CETYL ALCOHOL LUBE PER AS87132.

NN =    PASSIVATE PER AMS2700, NO LUBE.

PART NUMBER EXAMPLE:

## GENERAL NOTES:

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

- RUNOUT OF  " D" TO " PITCH" WITHIN .005". WHEN HELD ON THE " PITCH" OF THE COMPLETE THREADS NEAREST THE SHANK &amp; 1 CHECKED ON THE SHANK WITHIN ONE DIAMETER OF THE THREAD RUNOUT.
- BLENDED RADIUS TRANSITION PERMITS USE IN INTERFERENCE FIT APPLICATION. 2
- CURVED OR FLAT EDGE MANUFACTURER'S OPTION. 3
- FLUTE LOCATION ("K" DIMENSION) &amp; GEOMETRY ARE INSPECTED PER E106. 4
- THREADS MUST ACCEPT AN AS8879 "GO" RING GAGE TO ASSURE FREE RUNNING NUT CAPABILITY. AS8879 LIMITS DO NOT APPLY TO 5 THREADS IN THE FLUTED PORTION OF THE THREAD. THE MINOR AND PITCH MAY BE UP TO .004 BELOW AS8879 MINIMUM VALUES AND MAJOR MAY BE UP TO .002 BELOW SHEET 1 VALUES FOR A DISTANCE EQUAL TO THE FLUTE LENGTH PLUS 1.5P MAX.

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

SEE TABLE III.

- PINS SHALL BE PACKAGED OR REPACKAGED IN CLEAR SEALED BAGS. EACH BAG SHALL BE MARKED WITH PURCHASER'S &amp; 7. MANUFACTURER'S COMPLETE PART NUMBER, MANUFACTURER'S LOT NUMBER, MANUFACTURER'S OR DISTRIBUTOR'S NAME &amp; THE PACK DATE.
- VARIOUS NUT MATERIALS &amp; CONFIGURATION AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST. 8.
- PART (-10 DIAMETER) MANUFACTURED TO PREVIOUS REVISIONS WITH "T" MINIMUM DEPTH OF .090 ARE ACCEPTABLE FOR USE &amp; MAY 9. BE USED UNTIL DEPLETION OF INVENTORIES.
- PARTS WITH A MANUFACTURE DATE ON OR AFTER APRIL 7, 2011; SHALL HAVE THE SPLINE-LOK® RECESS PETALS REMOVED IN 10. ACCORDANCE WITH EBS2202. THE REQUIREMENTS OF EBS2202 ARE NOT APPLICABLE TO PARTS WITH A MANUFACTURE DATE PRIOR TO APRIL 7, 2011; THESE PARTS ARE ACCEPTABLE FOR USE UNTIL INVENTORIES ARE DEPLETED.
- UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED, PART INVENTORY MANUFACTURED TO PREVIOUS REVISIONS OF THE APPLICABLE  DRAWING OR 11. SPECIFICATION MAY BE PROCURED AND USED UNTIL STOCK IS DEPLETED.

| ELS338   | L REV:   | ECCN: EAR99   | SHEET 2 OF 6   |
|----------|----------|---------------|----------------|

![Image](data:image/png;base64,)

L

SHEET
